---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  - id: publications
    contents: "publications/*/index.pt.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: packages
    contents: "packages/*/index.pt.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 4
    image-height: 200px
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

## Publications

::: {#publications}
:::

## Packages

::: {#packages}
:::
